hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(/\.(md|txt)$/.test(p)&&!/(README|CLAUDE|AGENTS|CONTRIBUTING)\.md$/.test(p)&&!/\.claude\/plans\//.test(p)&&!/\.claude\/(rules|agents|commands)\/.+\.md$/.test(p)&&!/docs\/(strategies|reports)\/.+\.md$/.test(p)){console.error('[Hook] BLOCKED: Unnecessary documentation file creation');console.error('[Hook] File: '+p);console.error('[Hook] Use README.md for documentation instead');process.exit(2)}}catch{}console.log(d)})"

PreToolUse.description: Allow .md files in .claude/* and docs/* for HCESVM project

hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(p&&/\.py$/.test(p)&&!p.includes('__pycache__')&&!p.includes('.venv')){const{execSync}=require('child_process');try{execSync('command -v black',{stdio:'ignore'});execSync(\`black --quiet \"${p}\"\`,{stdio:'inherit'});console.error('[Hook] ✓ Formatted with Black: '+p)}catch(e){console.error('[Hook] ℹ Black not available, skipping format')}}}catch(e){}console.log(d)})"

PostToolUse.description: Auto-format Python files with Black after Edit/Write

hooks.command: node -e "const fs=require('fs');let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const i=JSON.parse(d);const p=i.tool_input?.file_path||'';if(p&&/\.py$/.test(p)&&!p.includes('__pycache__')&&!p.includes('.venv')&&!p.includes('tests/')){const{execSync}=require('child_process');try{execSync('command -v flake8',{stdio:'ignore'});const out=execSync(\`flake8 --max-line-length=88 --extend-ignore=E203,W503 \"${p}\"\`,{encoding:'utf-8',stdio:'pipe'});if(out.trim()){console.error('[Hook] ⚠ Flake8 warnings:\n'+out)}}catch(e){if(e.stdout){console.error('[Hook] ⚠ Flake8 warnings:\n'+e.stdout)}}}}catch(e){}console.log(d)})"

PostToolUse.description: Run Flake8 linter after editing Python source files

hooks.command: node -e "const{execSync}=require('child_process');let d='';process.stdin.on('data',c=>d+=c);process.stdin.on('end',()=>{try{const result=execSync('git diff --name-only --cached',{encoding:'utf-8'}).split('\n').filter(f=>f.endsWith('.py'));if(result.length>0){const consoleLog=execSync(\`git diff --cached -U0 | grep -E '^\\+.*console\\.log'\`,{encoding:'utf-8',stdio:'pipe'}).trim();if(consoleLog){console.error('[Hook] ⚠ WARNING: console.log found in staged files');console.error('[Hook] Consider removing debug statements before commit')}}}catch(e){}console.log(d)})"

Stop.description: Warn about console.log in staged Python files before response ends
